title: Codereview pass 2: Identity.__del__ - Consider try/except alternative
description: Alternative to hasattr() guards: A try/except AttributeError pattern would also work and may be more Pythonic for __del__ methods. However, the current hasattr() approach is explicit and readable. The existing implementation is acceptable - no change required. This is a style observation, not a defect.
close_reason: Implementation alternative suggestion - current approach is valid
